scope.summary: Dedup: duplicate of oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.13 (retitled: Publish oraclemcp 0.9.1, the 091 train terminal sink); its operator-stop-before-tag and no-qualification-inside-the-gated-step rules are absorbed into that bead body.
out_of_scope: The defect fix itself: it is tracked and will be evidence-closed on the canonical bead oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.13.

limitations: This is a tracker dedup (plan v8 sec.10 / G13 operator ruling 2026-07-20: one bead per defect, ever), not a claim the underlying defect is fixed.
The canonical open bead oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.13 carries the fix and its own landed evidence at close time.
